arts.ttl: ‘Still missing something’ – Stoke City vs Bristol City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Stoke City vs Bristol City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Tuesday. The post ‘Still missing something’ – Stoke City vs Bristol City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Bristol City's Mehmeti says opening goal against Middlesbrough 'was for the gaffer’
arts.sum: Anis Mehmeti has dedicated his opening goal against Middlesbrough and Bristol City ’s win at the Riverside to head coach Liam Manning and his family on the back of a devastating week at Ashton Gate. Assistant boss Hogg told of his immense pride in his players after their win, in how they handled the occasion, before revealing it as a key topic of discussion heading into the game as to how they would deal with their emotions after both sets of players, staff and supporters shared a minute’s applause in respect of the Manning family ahead of kick-off.

Stoke were behind for just five minutes against Norwich on Saturday afternoon before a Million Manhoef goal levelled the scoreline. Narcis Pelach has endured a mixed start to his time in charge, alt...
